primary_contrast: same model + same evidence + same budget, situation off versus on

data.sampling: 30 items per category x 7 categories = 210 items, seed 20260718
data.rendering: evidence-complete: claim text plus bracketed structured metadata (time, validity, status, source, scope, observers); identical evidence block for all conditions

provider: openrouter (single gateway for uniform usage and cost accounting)

fixed_controls.retries: resumable harness; rerun same command to retry errored calls

scale_and_cost.estimated_wallclock: ~1-2 h with the 7 models run as parallel processes

smoke_test.result: openrouter adapter verified end-to-end (llama-3.3-70b, gemini-2.5-flash: 8/8 calls scored); openai/gpt-5.1 blocked by HTTP 402 insufficient credits
smoke_test.blockers: OpenRouter credits exhausted (total_credits=0); native GEMINI_API_KEY invalid; xAI team has no credits

pipeline_validation.provider: mock (offline latest-mention text heuristic; reads evidence only, never gold)
pipeline_validation.coverage: 210 items x 6 conditions = 1,260 records, 0 errors; plain/FINAL/JSON extraction paths and aggregation all exercised
pipeline_validation.artifact: paper/results/raw/mock/ (see its README: simulated controls, never model evidence)

free_tier_attempt.target: 21-item stratified pilot (paper/data/situationcatch_free_pilot.jsonl), direct vs situation, qwen3-next-80b:free
free_tier_attempt.result: 0/42 calls succeeded; every :free model returned HTTP 429 (upstream congestion plus zero-credit account daily cap). Error records retained in paper/results/raw/e5_free_pilot_qwen3_next_80b.jsonl per the no-synthetic-results protocol
free_tier_attempt.note: free daily quota resets; a $10 lifetime top-up raises the free-model cap to 1,000 requests/day and unlocks the paid model set
